scripts.check:frontend: pnpm --dir frontend lint && pnpm --dir frontend typecheck && pnpm --dir frontend test && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.check:radar: pnpm --dir mobile/radar typecheck && pnpm --dir mobile/radar test && pnpm --dir mobile/radar exec expo install --check
scripts.contracts:generate: cd backend && uv run --locked python scripts/export_openapi.py ../packages/radar-contracts/openapi.json && cd .. && pnpm --dir packages/radar-contracts generate
scripts.contracts:check: cd backend && uv run --locked python scripts/export_openapi.py ../packages/radar-contracts/openapi.json --check && cd .. && pnpm --dir packages/radar-contracts check
